recommendations.title: Letters from Iwo Jima
recommendations.overview: The story of the battle of Iwo Jima between the United States and Imperial Japan during World War II, as told from the perspective of the Japanese who fought it.

recommendations.title: Sahara
recommendations.overview: In Libya, an American tank commander, along with a handful of Allied soldiers, tries to defend an isolated well with a limited supply of water from a German Afrika Korps battalion during the Western Desert Campaign of World War II.

recommendations.title: Ghosts of War
recommendations.overview: A group of World War II American soldiers encounter a supernatural enemy as they occupy a French castle previously under Nazi control.

recommendations.title: Where Eagles Dare
recommendations.overview: World War II is raging, and an American general has been captured and is being held hostage in the Schloss Adler, a Bavarian castle that's nearly impossible to breach. It's up to a group of skilled Allied soldiers to liberate the general before it's

recommendations.title: Taxi for Tobruk
recommendations.overview: During World War II, French Commandos join forces with a German officer in order to survive the African desert.

recommendations.title: Lifeboat
recommendations.overview: During World War II, a small group of survivors is stranded in a lifeboat together after the ship they were traveling on is destroyed by a German U-boat.

recommendations.title: Red Tails
recommendations.overview: The story of the Tuskegee Airmen, the first African-American pilots to fly in a combat squadron during World War II.

recommendations.title: Stalag 17
recommendations.overview: After two American prisoners are killed by guards in the act of escaping from a German POW camp in World War II, barracks black marketeer J.J. Sefton is suspected of being an informer.

recommendations.title: Escape to Victory
recommendations.overview: A group of POWs in a German prison camp during World War II play the German National Soccer Team in this powerful film depicting the role of prisoners during wartime.

recommendations.title: The Aftermath
recommendations.overview: In the aftermath of World War II, a British colonel and his wife are assigned to live in Hamburg during the post-war reconstruction, but tensions arise with the German widower who lives with them.
